Biography
Biography
Uzair Ahmad is a part-time lecturer at Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University. He earned his PhD in computer engineering from KyungHee University. His areas of teaching include machine learning, data mining, data science, and knowledge-based expert systems.
Ahmad has been published in IEEE Systems and Man and Cybernetics.
He is currently an SME at Ryerson University and is the CEO of Spimelab Inc. at Durham College.
